  1. org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert

Uses of Class
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert.R2dbcCustomConversions

Packages that use R2dbcCustomConversions
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config
Configuration classes for Spring Data R2DBC.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert
R2DBC-specific conversion and converter implementations.

  • Uses of R2dbcCustomConversions in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config

    Methods in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config that return R2dbcCustomConversions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    R2dbcCustomConversions
    AbstractR2dbcConfiguration.r2dbcCustomConversions()
    Register custom Converters in a CustomConversions object if required.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.config with parameters of type R2dbcCustomConversions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MappingR2dbcConverter
    AbstractR2dbcConfiguration.r2dbcConverter(R2dbcMappingContext mappingContext, R2dbcCustomConversions r2dbcCustomConversions)
    Creates a R2dbcConverter using the configured R2dbcMappingContext.
    R2dbcMappingContext
    AbstractR2dbcConfiguration.r2dbcMappingContext(Optional<NamingStrategy> namingStrategy, R2dbcCustomConversions r2dbcCustomConversions, RelationalManagedTypes r2dbcManagedTypes)
    Register a R2dbcMappingContext and apply an optional NamingStrategy.

  • Uses of R2dbcCustomConversions in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert

    Methods in org.springframework.data.r2dbc.convert that return R2dbcCustomConversions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static R2dbcCustomConversions
    R2dbcCustomConversions.create(R2dbcDialect dialect, Consumer<R2dbcCustomConversions.R2dbcConverterConfigurer> configurer)
    Create a new R2dbcCustomConversions instance using the given R2dbcDialect and R2dbcCustomConversions.R2dbcConverterConfigurer callback to configure converters.
    static R2dbcCustomConversions
    R2dbcCustomConversions.of(R2dbcDialect dialect, Object... converters)
    Create a new R2dbcCustomConversions from the given R2dbcDialect and converters.
    static R2dbcCustomConversions
    R2dbcCustomConversions.of(R2dbcDialect dialect, Collection<?> converters)
    Create a new R2dbcCustomConversions from the given R2dbcDialect and converters.
